pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 38 creates partner 'Azure Interior' via Odoo XML-RPC API; export_result.sh fetches opportunities filtered by this partner ID; verifier.py references target_partner_id
verifier.py line 26 declares target_color_index = 1; web search confirms Odoo standard palette uses index 1 for Red; setup_task.sh initializes all crm.lead records with color=0
verifier.py line 26 documents '# Red in Odoo standard palette'; web search on Odoo color indices confirms color index 1 = Red in standard palette across Odoo versions

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the 'Azure Interior' customer account with 4 seeded opportunities: Office Expansion Project (25000), Conference Room Redesign (12000), Executive Suite Update (35000), and Break Room Outfitting (6000). All opportunities are initialized with color index 0 (uncolored) and must be marked with Red (color index 1). The data is synthetic, created via Odoo XML-RPC during task setup, not from an external dataset.
